message:
feat: persistent "Running" banner in sidebar for live run navigation

When a test run is in progress, a pulsing teal banner appears at the
top of the sidebar showing the card title. Clicking it navigates back
to the live run view. Hidden when there's no active run or on error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
